Semiconductor Case

Peripheral Structural Parts for Semiconductor Equipment Chambers

chamber peripheral structure / sealing interface / flatness control

IndustriesSemiconductor
Part Functionchamber peripheral structure / sealing interface / flatness control
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, large-surface control, deburring, surface treatment coordination and CMM inspection

Project Scenario

The case centered on peripheral chamber structural parts with sealing surfaces, multi-face machining and controlled flatness.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The delivery package made critical interfaces and inspection points clear for later assembly and equipment debugging.
